features.name: Image Crawling & Download
features.description: Core web crawler that discovers and downloads images from URLs via crawl4ai API

features.name: Batch Crawling
features.description: Crawl multiple URLs concurrently with rate limiting, retry logic, and aggregated output

features.name: Data Extraction
features.description: Extract structured data via CSS selectors, JSON-CSS schemas, regex patterns, and page interactions

features.name: Image Compliance
features.description: Enforce image size and dimension limits with automatic compression and tile splitting

features.name: Direct Image Download
features.description: Download a list of image URLs with stealth headers and proxy support

features.name: Stealth & Anti-Detection
features.description: Browser fingerprint hardening, TLS rotation, behavioral simulation, geo consistency, and Cloudflare bypass

features.name: CAPTCHA Solving
features.description: Solve reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, Turnstile, and image CAPTCHAs via 2Captcha or Anti-Captcha APIs

features.name: Proxy Rotation
features.description: Load and rotate proxies with type and country metadata filtering

features.name: Session & Cookie Persistence
features.description: Persist and reuse browser sessions with cookies, localStorage, and fingerprint seeds

features.name: Stealth Profile Management
features.description: CRUD for named stealth configurations reusable across requests

features.name: MinIO Object Storage
features.description: Upload crawled images to MinIO with automatic bucket creation and presigned URLs

features.name: Touareg Database Tools
features.description: Parse batch crawl results into structured SQLite database with vehicle specs and analytics views

features.name: Touareg Database Explorer
features.description: Web interface for browsing, filtering, comparing, and querying scraped vehicle data
